name: refinery-html-to-llm-cleaner
title: Refinery: 0.40ms HTML Cleansing Engine for AI & RAG
description: Zero-LLM deterministic processing. No hallucinations, no data leakage to third-party APIs, and zero risk of steganographic instruction masking. Refinery is a compiled, native Rust utility binary built for strict enterprise compliance and high-velocity RAG pipelines. It does not interpret data—it cleans it with 100% mathematical predictability.
seoTitle: Refinery: 0.40ms HTML Cleansing Engine for AI & RAG
seoDescription: Zero-LLM deterministic HTML processing for enterprise AI pipelines. Strip JavaScript and CSS bloat in 0.40ms, reduce LLM token costs by 40%. Built for strict compliance and high-velocity RAG systems.
